name: @chbrain/khai-engine-role
description: khai engine content, the role domain: socially sanctioned expectations that govern what a persona may do and be
license: SEE LICENSE IN LICENSE and LICENSE-CODE

khai.tagline: socially sanctioned expectations that govern what a persona may do and be

card.wire: Link the role the persona occupies and the expectations the scene attaches to it to the anchor.
card.issue: Does this persona match, violate, exceed, or receive unclear expectations from their role?
card.require: Each persona links a role expression under Projection.
card.enforce: Do not collapse role into status; a persona can hold a congruent role at low status, or an incongruent role at high status.
card.setup: Specify the role the persona occupies and the expectations the scene treats as attached to it before assigning an expression.
